text: Here's what everybody's been trying to tell you today, and I say this gently: your user agreement sucks. You can spot me 75 IQ points. If I can figure it out, you can figure it out. The purpose of that user agreement is to cover Facebook's rear end. It's not to inform your users about their rights. Now you know that, and I know that. I'm going to suggest to you that you go back home and rewrite it, and tell your $1,200 an hour lawyers—no disrespect—they're good, but but tell them you want it written in English, in non-Swahili.
